name: CPUUtilization
definition: CPU utilization of the DB instance; fast fleet-health signal but not sufficient alone for database saturation decisions.
absence_means: Metric absent or namespace mismatch in Tsuga
cardinality_footguns: Safe when grouped by instance/class

name: FreeableMemory
definition: Amount of available memory that can be reclaimed; low headroom often precedes I/O and latency pain.
absence_means: Metric absent or namespace mismatch in Tsuga
cardinality_footguns: Do not combine with high-card SQL digests

name: DiskQueueDepth
definition: Queued disk operations waiting on storage; useful with read/write latency and IOPS.
absence_means: Metric absent or unsupported for this surface
cardinality_footguns: Queue depth by tiny transient entities is noisy; stay at instance granularity

name: DatabaseConnections
definition: Number of client connections to the DB instance; first demand and pool-leak signal.
absence_means: No recent connections or namespace mismatch
cardinality_footguns: Do not group by user/session unless Stage 2 proves bounded fields

name: NetworkReceiveThroughput
definition: Bytes received from clients and peers per second at the instance boundary.
absence_means: Feature absent or namespace mismatch
cardinality_footguns: Use instance or region rather than client-address groupings

name: NetworkTransmitThroughput
definition: Bytes transmitted by the DB instance per second; pairs with receive throughput for traffic shape analysis.
absence_means: Feature absent or namespace mismatch
cardinality_footguns: Stay at instance granularity for overview widgets

name: ReadIOPS
definition: Read operations per second on storage for the DB instance.
absence_means: Read path idle or namespace mismatch
cardinality_footguns: Interpret with throughput because operation size matters

name: WriteIOPS
definition: Write operations per second on storage for the DB instance.
absence_means: Write path idle or namespace mismatch
cardinality_footguns: Write-heavy bursts can look worse than reads even when latency is stable

name: ReadLatency
definition: Average latency per read I/O operation.
absence_means: Metric absent or no read I/O in range
cardinality_footguns: Average latency is not a percentile; do not over-interpret tiny spikes

name: WriteLatency
definition: Average latency per write I/O operation.
absence_means: Metric absent or no write I/O in range
cardinality_footguns: Needs context from queue depth and log pressure

name: ReadThroughput
definition: Bytes read from disk per second.
absence_means: Read workload absent or namespace mismatch
cardinality_footguns: Throughput without IOPS obscures I/O size distribution

name: WriteThroughput
definition: Bytes written to disk per second.
absence_means: Write workload absent or namespace mismatch
cardinality_footguns: Throughput alone cannot distinguish healthy batching from saturation

name: FreeStorageSpace
definition: Remaining storage on the DB instance; time-to-outage signal for growth and retention problems.
absence_means: Metric absent or namespace mismatch in Tsuga
cardinality_footguns: Free storage grouped by too many dimensions adds no value; keep instance-level

name: BurstBalance
definition: Percentage of burst-credit balance remaining for burstable storage surfaces.
absence_means: Storage type may not emit this metric
cardinality_footguns: Do not assume absence means healthy zero; many storage types do not use credits

name: EBSByteBalance%
definition: Percentage of throughput credits remaining for supported EBS-backed storage.
absence_means: Metric exists only on certain storage configurations
cardinality_footguns: Volume-scoped variants should stay gated unless Stage 3 confirms the field

name: EBSIOBalance%
definition: Percentage of I/O credits remaining for supported EBS-backed storage.
absence_means: Metric exists only on certain storage configurations
cardinality_footguns: Stage 2 confirmed the live name normalizes the percent sign away

name: Deadlocks
definition: Deadlock events reported for the DB instance and carried into Tsuga as a summary metric, so use windowed sums rather than counter-rate math.
absence_means: No deadlocks in the selected window
cardinality_footguns: Use instance or engine only; per-query groupings need logs or database-insights surfaces

name: DBLoad
definition: Average active sessions running or waiting; best engine saturation signal when Performance Insights is enabled.
absence_means: Performance Insights not enabled or not exported
cardinality_footguns: Do not group by SQL digest on overview dashboards

name: DBLoadCPU
definition: Portion of DB load running on CPU; pairs with DBLoadNonCPU to separate compute saturation from waits.
absence_means: Performance Insights not enabled or not exported
cardinality_footguns: Needs DBLoad for full interpretation

name: DBLoadNonCPU
definition: Portion of DB load waiting on non-CPU resources; high values often mean lock or I/O waits.
absence_means: Performance Insights not enabled or not exported
cardinality_footguns: Wait-heavy load needs gating if PI fields are absent

name: DBLoadRelativeToNumVCPUs
definition: Ratio of DB load to available vCPU capacity; already normalized for quick saturation checks.
absence_means: Performance Insights not enabled or not exported
cardinality_footguns: Do not apply rate or per-second transforms to this ratio

name: TransactionLogsDiskUsage
definition: Disk space used by transaction logs; especially relevant for SQL Server and write-heavy workloads.
absence_means: Engine does not emit this metric or namespace mismatch
cardinality_footguns: Should not be treated as universal across engines

name: TransactionLogsGeneration
definition: Rate at which transaction logs are generated; indicates write amplification and log churn.
absence_means: Engine does not emit this metric or namespace mismatch
cardinality_footguns: Keep to instance-level grouping unless Stage 3 confirms richer dimensions

name: ReplicaLag
definition: Replica delay surface currently confirmed in Tsuga for the RDS to Aurora PostgreSQL replication path; use it as the live replication-lag proxy until a generic replica metric appears.
absence_means: No replica-lag metric for this topology or namespace mismatch
cardinality_footguns: Current live signal is Aurora PostgreSQL specific; keep generic title but note the live scope

name: ChangeLogBytesUsed
definition: Bytes currently retained in the engine change-log surface exposed by the live aws_rds catalog; use as the confirmed log-retention pressure signal where generic binlog storage is absent.
absence_means: Engine does not emit this metric or namespace mismatch
cardinality_footguns: Interpret as a live log-retention proxy rather than a universal cross-engine binlog metric

name: BinLogDiskUsage
definition: Disk space consumed by binary logs on MySQL or MariaDB family instances.
absence_means: No generic MySQL or MariaDB binlog disk metric was found in the live Tsuga catalog; keep this as documented but currently unavailable.
cardinality_footguns: MySQL-family only and currently missing in the live catalog

name: OldestReplicationSlotLag
definition: Amount of lag for the oldest PostgreSQL replication slot; indicates stalled logical consumers.
absence_means: PostgreSQL logical replication not enabled or namespace mismatch
cardinality_footguns: PostgreSQL-specific and easy to misread as ordinary replica lag

name: ReplicationSlotDiskUsage
definition: Disk used by PostgreSQL replication slots that retain WAL files.
absence_means: PostgreSQL logical replication not enabled or namespace mismatch
cardinality_footguns: Keep gated; absent on most non-PostgreSQL engines

name: NOT_APPLICABLE
definition: RDS operational metrics do not directly expose billing totals; use throughput, storage usage, instance class, and log growth as cost proxies until billing telemetry is integrated.
absence_means: Cost metrics require separate billing export data
cardinality_footguns: Safe
